title: Private method is never used
messageFormat: Remove this unused private method or call it where it is needed.
summary: A private method that is never called within its declaring type is unreachable code. It cannot be invoked from outside, so the reader is left guessing whether it is a forgotten helper, an unfinished feature, or a hazard waiting to be wired up incorrectly.
Delete the method, or call it from the code path it was written for.
